S.FORM: = Pedro Pablo Kuczynski = Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 10 jiyax 3 ka Pedro Pablo Kuczynski ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Peru ta sayang o kiya ka Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 7 jiyax 28 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan pəɾu ta sajaŋ o kija ka pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Pedro Pablo Kuczynski = Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 10 jiyax 3 ka Pedro Pablo Kuczynski ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Peru ta sayang o kiya ka Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 7 jiyax 28 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan pəɾu ta sajaŋ o kija ka pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
